pages.text: Every resource in Productive Frogs comes from one loop. A Resource Slime of a given resource is eaten by its matching Frog, which drops a Froglight. Smelt that Froglight to get a copy of the resource.$(br2)Set the chain up once and it runs in the background while you do other things.

Resource Slimes are the input. Each is tied to one resource - iron, copper, clay, and so on. You get them by priming slimes that spawn in the world, or by farming them with Slime Milk (see the Slimes & Slime Milk chapter).

A Froglight is what a frog drops when it eats its matching slime. Smelt it for a copy of the resource.$(br2)To gather the drops on their own, pin the frog over a hopper with a Sweetslimed Lily Pad, or run the whole loop inside a Terrarium - both keep the frog in one spot so its Froglights land where you want them.
